Package io.github.dailystruggle.effectsapi

Class Effect<T extends Enum<T>>

java.lang.Object
org.bukkit.scheduler.BukkitRunnable
io.github.dailystruggle.effectsapi.Effect<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Cloneable, Runnable
Direct Known Subclasses:
FireworkEffect, NoteEffect, NoteEffect_1_12, ParticleEffect, PotionEffect, SoundEffect
public abstract class Effect<T extends Enum<T>> extends org.bukkit.scheduler.BukkitRunnable implements Cloneable
